case_title: TINA ZHENG VS. MARCELLINO FONTINO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE PER SFSO: SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE OF A BAD ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHENG, TINA AS TO DEFENDANT FONTINO, DAPHNE
DECLARATION OF NEW MAILING ADDRESS OF DEFENDANT. FILED BY DEFENDANT FONTINO, MARCELLINO FONTINO, DAPHNE
RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS-CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO TINA ZHENG ON 08-07-14. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
RETURNED MAIL; SMALL CLAIMS-CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO MARCELLINO FONTINO ON 08-07-14. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT FONTINO, DAPHNE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,920.00 FILED BY ZHENG, TINA AS TO DEFENDANT FONTINO, MARCELLINO FONTINO, DAPHNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE PER SFSO, SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE OF A BAD ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHENG, TINA AS TO DEFENDANT FONTINO, MARCELLINO

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHENG, TINA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. APPEARANCES (2) BY DEFENDANTS, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-10-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING - GRANTED.
